title: Senior Software Engineer - Nucleus Software International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Nucleus Software International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Nucleus Software International Enterprises in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nucleus Software International Enterprises:
Nucleus Software International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software International Enterprises!
